// frontend/src/components/common/ScrollToTop.js
import{useEffect}from'react';import{useLocation}from'react-router-dom';const ScrollToTop=()=>{const{pathname}=useLocation();useEffect(()=>{// Force scroll to top on every route change
const scrollToTop=()=>{// Try multiple methods to ensure it works
window.scrollTo(0,0);// Also try the smooth method
window.scrollTo({top:0,left:0,behavior:'instant'});// For browsers that might need a delay
setTimeout(()=>{window.scrollTo(0,0);},10);setTimeout(()=>{window.scrollTo(0,0);},50);};scrollToTop();// Also handle popstate events (back/forward buttons)
const handlePopState=()=>{scrollToTop();};window.addEventListener('popstate',handlePopState);return()=>{window.removeEventListener('popstate',handlePopState);};},[pathname]);return null;};export default ScrollToTop;
